heroBio: **Senior Manager II, Software Engineer** at **Circana** with **17+ years** building and leading **mobile and hybrid applications**. I lead engineering teams to deliver **consumer intelligence and analytics** for global brands—from planning and architecture through to **Play Store and App Store** release. Passionate about **clean code**, **engineering discipline**, and **shipping on time**.
bio:
I'm a **Senior Manager II, Software Engineer** at **Circana**, where I lead and hands-on deliver **mobile and cross-platform solutions** that power **consumer intelligence and analytics** for global CPG, retail, and brand clients.

**What I do:** I own the **full lifecycle**—from project initiation and planning through development, testing, and delivery. I drive **end-to-end delivery** of mobile applications and connected experiences using a broad technology stack: **native and cross-platform mobile** (React Native, Flutter, Kotlin, Swift), APIs, and cloud services. I've shipped products across multiple domains (**consumer insights**, **retail analytics**, field and internal tools) and use **industry-standard tools** every day: **Git**, **Scrum and Jira**, **build automation and CI/CD**, and **Play Store / App Store** release. I focus on **efficient team handling**, **clear processes**, and getting **quality software** into users' hands on time.

**Why it matters:** At Circana, our work helps brands and retailers understand and act on **consumer behavior**. My focus is making that intelligence **accessible**, **reliable**, and **performant**—whether on phones, tablets, or internal dashboards. I care about **clean architecture**, **team growth**, and **shipping on time** without cutting corners on quality.

**Beyond the day job:** I stay current with **mobile and platform trends** and enjoy turning **complex requirements** into **simple, scalable systems**. Open to connecting with folks in **mobile engineering**, **product**, and **consumer/retail tech**.
quickBits: Senior Manager II, Software Engineer at Circana

timeline.title: Assistant Lecturer / Technical Trainer
timeline.note: Aditya College Of Technology & Science, Satna
